text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Thanks so much for giving me time
off! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yup! I rewatched the whole Sumo Broadcasting: Best Matches Compilation! It was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I've got an idea! We should go watch some live
sumo wrestling together, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Hishi Akebono had a nice, refreshing
break.
